signals.headline: Kerala Assembly Voting Underway | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kerala Assembly Voting Underway | YES | HIGH confidence**

Voting is currently underway in Kerala assembly elections alongside Assam and Puducherry for single-phase polls[4].

signals.headline: IUML Critical to UDF's Electoral Fortunes | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
IUML Critical to UDF's Electoral Fortunes | YES | HIGH confidence**

The IUML is contesting 27 seats and roughly contributes 15-20 seats to UDF's tally—approximately one-fifth of seats needed for majority[2]. The party surged to 9.77% statewide vote share in 2025 local body elections, its highest leverage in years[2].

signals.raw:
IUML Leader Charged with Election Code Violations | YES | HIGH confidence**

Tirur Police registered a case against IUML state vice-president C P Bava Haji for allegedly offering a 15-day foreign trip to panchayat office-bearers to secure votes for UDF candidate V S Joy in Thavanur constituency[5].
